title: Full Bundle Tooltip
description: This mod changes the Bundle item tooltip to show every item inside instead of only the first 11-12
body:
This mod changes the Bundle's tooltip to show its full contents (up to 64 slots) instead of being limited to only 11-12 slots. The capacity bar in the tooltip has also been modified to show the used/total capacity in numeric form (e.g. 12/64)

The tooltip can expand up to an 8x8 grid and may take up a large portion of the screen at lower resolutions.
